profile.education: Rutgers College (BA, History & Political Science); Rutgers Law School (JD)
profile.background: Attorney; worked in pharmaceutical policy and lobbying in Washington D.C.; West Virginia Attorney General (2013-2025); became 36th governor in January 2025.

profile.education: Duke University (BS Zoology), University of Virginia (MEd)
profile.background: Former West Virginia state legislator and U.S. House member. Daughter of three-term Governor Arch Moore. First woman elected to Senate from West Virginia. Former college counselor.
Billionaire coal and agriculture magnate and former Governor of West Virginia. Owner of The Greenbrier resort. Largest farmer east of the Mississippi. Switched from Democrat to Republican in 2017.

candidates.name: Roger Hanshaw
candidates.notes: Speaker of the West Virginia House — verified via https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Speaker_of_the_West_Virginia_House_of_Representatives.

profile.leadership_role: Speaker of the West Virginia House

profile.education: West Point (BS Mechanical Engineering), Princeton University (PhD International Relations)
profile.background: Former CEO of Bridgewater Associates hedge fund. Gulf War Army veteran with Bronze Star. Under Secretary of Treasury under George W. Bush. West Point graduate.
